title: gastrochilus bigibbus
intro: Gastrochilus bigibbus, also known as the twin-horned orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, particularly those related to the respiratory and digestive systems. The medicinal properties of Gastrochilus bigibbus are attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is used to treat coughs, colds, and digestive issues, and is also used as an expectorant to relieve respiratory congestion.
